title: Data and Statistics Act 2022 (New Zealand Public Act)
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the framework for collection, management, and use of official statistics and research data across government. Defines roles of Statistics New Zealand and the Government Statistician, sets requirements for data confidentiality and privacy protection, and establishes compliance and enforcement mechanisms.
